title: Francium
description: Vanilla on Steroids. 5 months of research in order to bring you the BEST optimization and QoL mods. [Available for 1.21.9]
body:
![Official Banner for Francium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9d42606de1d1c4246a0a57a61d3e33400797cb6_0.webp) ### Lag? **Deleted.** ### FPS? **Boosted.** ### Looks? **Clean.** **Francium** is built for players who want Minecraft to run like a dream—no lag, no clutter, no setup headaches. Unlike the countless modpacks out there that lazily cram in random, bloated mods with zero synergy or purpose, this pack stands out as a meticulously researched and thoroughly tested experience. It’s powerfully optimized with top-tier performance mods, so your FPS stays high and your load times stay low. Just drop it in and go. The UI is clean, the gameplay is smooth, and every mod is handpicked to enhance vanilla without overwhelming it. Whether you're on a potato PC or a gaming rig, Francium makes Minecraft feel fresh, fast, and plug-and-play perfect. ### _For a list of the mods look in the dropdowns below._
🚀 Performance Optimization Mods

Mods that boost FPS, reduce memory usage, and improve overall game performance.

  • Sodium – Replaces Minecraft’s renderer for massive FPS boosts.
  • Lithium – Optimizes physics and block updates for better performance.
  • FerriteCore – Reduces RAM usage by optimizing object storage.
  • ModernFix – Fixes memory leaks and speeds up loading times.
  • Krypton – Improves network performance and reduces latency.
  • ImmediatelyFast – Speeds up rendering by optimizing OpenGL calls.
  • ThreadTweak – Enhances multithreading for smoother gameplay.
  • ThreatenGL – Changes GL version from 3 to a higher version to improve performance.
  • C2ME – Loads chunks faster using concurrent threading.
  • Chunky – Pre-generates chunks to reduce in-game lag.
  • FastQuit – Speeds up quitting and world saving.
  • Dynamic FPS – Lowers resource usage when Minecraft is unfocused.
  • Entity Culling – Hides unseen entities to improve rendering speed.
  • More Culling – Extends culling to block entities and particles.
  • XXL Packets – Enables larger network packets for smoother multiplayer.
  • AsyncParticles – Renders particles asynchronously to reduce lag.
  • Debugify – Fixes vanilla bugs and improves performance.
  • BadOptimizations – Replaces inefficient vanilla code with faster alternatives.
  • Fast IP Ping – Speeds up server pinging in the multiplayer menu.
  • Packet Fixer – Resolves packet desync issues for smoother networking.
  • ScalableLux – Adds scalable lighting effects optimized for shaders.
  • Cull Leaves – Improves leaf rendering performance and appearance.
  • Audio Engine Tweaks – Enhances audio performance and quality.
  • Noxesium – Improves the multiplayer experience on certain servers.
  • Very Many Players – Optimizes multiplayer for large servers.
  • Exordium – Caps the rendering of the UI to a certain framerate to speed up world rendering.
  • Raknetify – Improves network performance using RakNet.
  • Noisium – Pairs with C2ME to improve world gen times.
🎨 Visual Polish Mods

Mods that enhance graphics, lighting, animations, and overall aesthetics.

  • Remove Reloading Screen – Eliminates the ugly resource pack reload screen.
  • Iris Shaders – Enables shader support with Sodium compatibility.
  • LambDynamicLights – Adds dynamic lighting from held and dropped items.
  • Better Clouds – Improves cloud visuals.
  • BetterGrassify – Enhances grass blocks for a more natural look.
  • Wavey Capes – Adds realistic cape animations.
  • 3D Skin Layers – Adds depth to player skins for a 3D effect.
  • Continuity – Adds connected textures support for resource packs.
  • Cubes Without Borders – Allows a borderless fullscreen Minecraft experience.
  • Zoomify – Adds smooth zoom functionality.
  • Gamma Utils – Enables fullbright and gamma control.
  • Chunks Fade In – Adds smooth chunk loading animations.
  • Better Third Person – Enhances third-person camera movement.
  • Model Gap Fix – Fixes visual gaps in entity models.
  • Better Mount HUD – Improves the HUD when riding entities.
💬 Chat and UI Enhancements

Mods that improve the user interface, chat experience, and accessibility.

  • Mod Menu – Adds a mod list and config button to the main menu.
  • OptiGUI – Improves GUI animations and transitions.
  • Smooth GUI – Adds smooth opening and closing animations to menus.
  • Chat Animation – Animates chat messages for smoother appearance.
  • Chat Heads – Displays player heads next to chat messages.
  • More Chat History – Increases the number of stored chat messages.
  • No Chat Reports – Disables chat reporting for safer multiplayer.
  • Language Reload – Reloads language files without restarting.
  • FPS Display – Shows FPS counter in the HUD.
  • Controlling – Adds keybind search and conflict resolution.
  • Reese's Sodium Options – Adds a GUI for Sodium settings.
  • Ping Display – Displays ping on multiplayer servers.
  • Better Tab – Replacement for Ping Display on newer versions (1.21.5+).
⚔️ PvP and Multiplayer Enhancements

Mods that improve the multiplayer experience and give you a big edge in PvP.

  • ViaFabricPlus – Enables cross-version server compatibility.
  • Bobby – Allows viewing of chunks beyond server view distance.
  • Cut Through – Fixes the annoying issue of not being able to hit entities through tall grass. (May get you flagged with anticheat—use with caution)
  • Resourcify – Manages resource packs and updates them.
  • Sound Controller – Adds sound controls for all the sounds in the game.
  • Mouse Tweaks – Adds tweaks to default mouse functions to make your life a lot easier.
  • Armor HUD – Displays armor durability and status in the HUD.
  • Centered Crosshair – Centers the crosshair for better aim.
  • Crosshair Indicator – Adds status indicators to the crosshair.
  • Effect Timer Plus – Displays potion effect timers on screen.
  • AppleSkin – Shows hunger and saturation info in the HUD.
  • RealArrowTip – Adds colors to indicate which tipped arrow you are using.
📚 Libraries & APIs

Dependencies and frameworks that support other mods.

  • Fabric API – Core API for most Fabric mods.
  • Cloth Config API – Provides config screens for mods.
  • YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL) – Modern config UI library.
  • Forge Config API Port – Port of Forge’s config system to Fabric.
  • Puzzles Lib – Shared library for mod development.
  • Fabric Language Kotlin – Enables Kotlin support for Fabric mods.
  • Collective – Library for Serilum’s lineup of mods.
  • Searchables – Library for Controlling.
🎨 Resource Packs

Some nice resource packs that I have included (delete these if you don’t like them).

  • Default Dark Mode – Applies dark mode to menus and UI.
  • Unique Dark – Improves dark mode visuals across the UI.
  • Low Shield – Lowers shield position for better visibility.
  • Low On Fire – Moves fire overlay lower to reduce screen obstruction.
  • Chat Reporting Helper – Adds tools to manage and block chat reports.
